case_title: RAW BANDWITH COMMUNICATIONS, INC. VS. TIMOTHY NGO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF RAW BANDWITH COMMUNICATIONS INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TIMOTHY NGO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS REVIEWD AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $120.52 FILED BY RAW BANDWITH COMMUNICATIONS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NGO, TIMOTHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $60.00 - SERVED AUG-12-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NGO, TIMOTHY
ORDER REQUEST TO CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR IN THE JUDGMENT (SC-108)
AUTHORIZATION OF MICHAEL S. DURKIN TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAW BANDWITH COMMUNICATIONS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAW BANDWITH COMMUNICATIONS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGO, TIMOTHY $120.52 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $210.52 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAW BANDWITH COMMUNICATIONS, INC.
